description: Isolated structural cases for proposed cognitive-control records. Passing cases confer no authority and do not establish semantic correctness, noninterference, review, or Gate A acceptance.

cases.name: model-configuration-record-semantically-rejects-contradictory-current-validity
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: current disposition contradicts controlled observation time

cases.name: routing-decision-semantically-rejects-selected-reference-mismatch
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: selected reference does not equal selected candidate

cases.name: routing-decision-semantically-rejects-candidate-count-mismatch
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: considered_count does not equal candidate_set length

cases.name: routing-decision-semantically-rejects-selected-candidate-with-unknown-dimension
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: selected candidate contains an unknown decision dimension

cases.name: routing-decision-semantically-rejects-selected-configuration-as-own-fallback
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: selected configuration cannot be its own fallback

cases.name: work-intent-semantic-check-rejects-noncanonical-set-order
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: must use Unicode-codepoint ascending canonical order

cases.name: work-intent-semantic-check-rejects-local-only-nonzero-egress-estimate
cases.expected_semantic_refusal_contains: nonzero network/spend estimate requires a future governed external boundary
